## Properties

| Property         | Attribute          | Description                                                                        | Type     | Default     |
| ---------------- | ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ----------- |
| `height`         | `height`           | The height of the carousel. Accepts any valid CSS height value.                    | `string` | `'inherit'` |
| `slideShowDelay` | `slide-show-delay` | The delay (in milliseconds) between automatic slide transitions in slideshow mode. | `number` | `5000`      |
| `width`          | `width`            | The width of the carousel. Accepts any valid CSS width value.                      | `string` | `'100%'`    |
